title: The Bicycle Thief
tagline: The Bicycle Thief is the simple yet charming story of a young girl's quest to get her stolen bike back.
overview: Riding through a children’s wonderland of ice cream parlours and amusement parks, a Little Girl’s innocent adventure is interrupted when her beloved bicycle is stolen. Forced to choose between giving it up, or giving chase, she sets off on a new and daring adventure in pursuit of the Big Man who has taken it.
